## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync for Jason's pod to discuss Surge and Augment projects, content strategy, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Surge website nearly ready; final tweaks and SEO optimization needed](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Augment content strategy needs prioritization; focus on quality over quantity](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Workflow improvements required for content generation and editing processes](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [New initiatives: GrowthX engineers blog and automation reporting dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)

## Topics

### Surge Website Progress

  - [Website nearly complete; 9/10 requested changes implemented](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Some Safari-specific issues remain (jitteriness); may remove effects for Safari](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [SEO basics in place (meta descriptions, titles, tags); sitemap to be added](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Checklist of completed items to be created for transparency](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

### Augment Content Strategy

  - [Content strategy process started 2-3 weeks ago; needs prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Jacob provided topic clusters and keyword suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Goal: Create prioritized list of topics grouped by clusters](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Focus on steering content generation rather than extensive editing](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

### Content Quality and Workflow

  - [Current volume (30 articles/week) challenging for thorough editing](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Suggestion: Prioritize 2-10 articles/week for in-depth editing](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Need to demonstrate value of refreshes and quality improvements](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Workflow improvements needed; task force to be formed for rapid changes](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)

### New Initiatives

  - [GrowthX engineers blog: Simple, public-facing developer blog to be created](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Augment CLI integration: To be added to existing Sanity installation](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [Automation reporting: Suleiman working on Looker Studio dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)

### SEO Optimization

  - [Need to incorporate target prompts into article titles (e.g., "in 2025")](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [URL slugs should avoid numbers and dates; redirects may be needed for updates](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
  - [Process for checking and optimizing titles and slugs to be refined](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Edin: Create sitemap and checklist for Surge website; start on GrowthX engineers blog](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Nathalie: Prioritize content strategy and roadmap creation; prepare meeting agenda for Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Marisol: Continue newsletter management; refine title optimization process](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [Jason: Form task force for workflow improvements; follow up on repo access](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [Team: Focus on demonstrating value of quality content and refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/TfCH13u9VqTyGo8YMrWH7eTvx_Xyk7AJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
